nodes.name: create_sink.sql
nodes.summary: Defines a RisingWave sink that writes materialized view data into an Amazon DynamoDB table using the DynamoDB connector.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Creates the `movies` source table in RisingWave with year, title, and description fields as the upstream data for the DynamoDB sink integration test.

nodes.name: create_table_request.json
nodes.summary: JSON payload for the DynamoDB CreateTable API call, specifying the table name, key schema, attribute definitions, and provisioned throughput for the integration test table.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration for the DynamoDB sink integration test, starting a local DynamoDB emulator (DynamoDB Local) and RisingWave.

nodes.name: prepare.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that provisions the local DynamoDB table by calling the AWS CLI with the create_table_request.json payload against the DynamoDB Local endpoint.

nodes.name: query.sql
nodes.summary: Validation queries that insert, update, and delete rows in RisingWave to test full DML propagation to DynamoDB through the sink connector.
